confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_6112c84b-de87-4187-978e-35a7021b4412 read back as promoted

containment: Builder rejected the incomplete reports with blocking findings.
The affected tasks were reopened for repair rather than closed.
corrective_action: Audit task report admission for evidence completeness checks before creating review obligations.
Decide whether unchecked criteria and scaffold placeholders should block report submission or be surfaced as explicit report warnings.
Repair affected tasks by completing evidence or withdrawing/replacing the reports.

incident.common_failure: task report/review obligations were present while required task evidence remained unchecked or placeholder

preventive_action: Add regression coverage for attempted task report submission with unchecked criteria and scaffold execution notes.
Make reviewer work-next or task read clearly distinguish complete reports from evidence-incomplete reports.
payload.recommendation: Promote to a Narada proper CAPA task for report-admission evidence completeness hardening.
root_cause_hypothesis: Task report admission may allow reports to be submitted before acceptance criteria and execution evidence are complete.
Review obligation creation may not surface evidence completeness strongly enough before placing work on a reviewer.
Existing validation distinguishes report presence from proof that task evidence satisfies the required work.
payload.summary: Builder review encountered repeated in-review tasks whose reports existed but task evidence remained incomplete: acceptance criteria unchecked and execution notes or verification still scaffold placeholders.
payload.title: CAPA: Review reports submitted with placeholder task evidence
verification: A task with scaffold execution notes and unchecked criteria cannot silently produce a clean review obligation.
Tasks 1270, 1267, and 1271 remain open until repaired evidence is supplied and a new review is requested.

task.title: CAPA: Review reports submitted with placeholder task evidence
